name: Actionability
description: For decision-support reports: how useful is this for someone who needs to act on it?

clear_recommendations.description: Does the report provide specific, concrete recommendations or next steps rather than vague conclusions?

tradeoff_analysis.description: Does the report identify key tradeoffs, risks, and constraints a decision-maker would need to weigh?

prioritization.description: Does the report distinguish between high-impact and low-impact findings, helping the reader focus on what matters most?

audience_fit.description: Is the report calibrated to the right level of detail and vocabulary for someone who needs to act on it (not too academic, not too superficial)?
